name: sim.clocked_terminate with condition operand
description: Code should include a `sim.clocked_terminate` operation in MLIR that takes a clock value and a boolean condition operand, representing a missing lowering target in arcilator.

name: SystemVerilog stop() statement
description: Code should include a SystemVerilog `stop()` statement that triggers simulation termination when executed, which may lower to a `sim.clocked_terminate` operation in hardware compilers.

name: SystemVerilog assert() with clocked termination
description: Code should include a SystemVerilog `assert()` statement evaluated on a clock edge that can lower to a clocked simulation termination construct in a hardware compiler.
